login.title: Xharada
login.subtitle: Sign in to access your goals
login.firstTime: Need an account? Ask your administrator.

home.noGoals: No goals yet. Create your first goal above!
home.shareUrlInfo: Share the UI link with browser-based agents. The JSON link returns raw API data directly — works with CLI agents, MCP, curl, etc.
home.shareUrlWarning: ⚠️ These URLs contain your API key. Only share them with trusted agents — anyone with the link can read and modify your goals.
home.jsonUrlDisabled: JSON URL sharing is disabled. Enable "Allow API key in URL" in
home.jsonUrlDisabledSuffix: to generate a shareable JSON link.
home.newApiKeyGenerated: New API key generated. Copy and store it securely.
home.deleteGoalMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this goal? This cannot be undone.

goalGrid.clickYellowCells: Click on yellow cells to add sub-goals. Use "Full 9x9 Grid" view to see all actions nested in sub-goals.
goalGrid.noActions: No actions yet. Tap the card above or use Full grid view to add actions.
goalGrid.addSubGoalPrompt: Give this new sub-goal a name so it stands out on the grid.
goalGrid.addActionPrompt: Describe the action you want to track underneath this sub-goal.
goalGrid.noActivityLogged: No activity logged yet. Add your first entry above!
goalGrid.markdownPlaceholder:
Enter your goal description in markdown...

**Example:**
- Use **bold** and *italic*
- Create lists
- Add [links](https://example.com)
- And more!
goalGrid.deleteActionMessage: Delete action "{{title}}"? This cannot be undone.

agents.apiKeyInstructions: Enter your API key below or add it to the URL as
agents.apiKeyHeader: Include the API key in the

sharedGoal.linkExpiredFallback: This share link may have been revoked or the goal no longer exists.
sharedGoal.noActivityLogs: No activity logs for this action.
sharedGoal.logsNotIncluded: Activity logs are not included in this share link.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage API keys and access documentation for AI agents
settings.noApiKeys: No API keys yet. Create one to allow AI agents to access your goals.
settings.allowApiKeyInUrlDesc: When enabled, API keys can be passed as
settings.allowApiKeyInUrlDescSuffix: query parameters. This is less secure but necessary for browser-based agent landing page sharing.
settings.quickStartDesc: Include your API key in the request header to access your goals:
settings.displayPreferencesDesc: These preferences live in your browser (localStorage). Update them anytime to change how grids render.
settings.defaultGoalViewDesc: Choose which layout loads first when you open a goal.
settings.compactViewDesc: Grid summary tiles with action list.
settings.fullViewDesc: Full 9×9 Harada board with inline editing.
settings.goalsPerPageDesc: Number of goals shown per page on the home screen.
settings.colorPaletteDesc: Pick a palette or override individual sub-goal colors below.
settings.customSubGoalColorsDesc: Override any individual block. Leave a color unset to inherit from the palette.
settings.inheritActionColors: Actions inherit their parent sub-goal color
settings.actionLightness: Action lightness (0% = same as parent, 100% = white)
settings.centerLayoutDesc: Decide how the main goal appears inside the 3×3 center.
settings.directionalBridgesDesc: Center goal plus three inner bridge boxes referencing sub-goals with arrows.
settings.centerBackgroundDesc: Choose whether the middle 3×3 zone blends with the white card or matches the page's gray backdrop.
settings.matchPageDesc: Light gray like the outer page.
settings.exportGoalsDesc: Download a snapshot of your goals, sub-goals, actions, and activity logs as a portable JSON file.
settings.selectAtLeastOneGoal: Select at least one goal to export.
settings.importGoalsDesc: Upload a JSON file previously exported from Harada. Goals are always appended (never overwritten).
settings.importTip: Tip: export first to see the exact schema. Import always appends new goals; it never overwrites existing ones.
settings.selectedFileNotJson: Selected file is not valid JSON
settings.noGoalsInFile: No goals found in uploaded file.
settings.agentEtiquetteDesc: Customize the etiquette guidelines shown to AI agents on the landing page.
settings.expiresHint: Leave at 365 for 1 year, or set to 3650 for 10 years
settings.copyKeyWarning: ⚠️ Copy this key now - it will not be shown again!
settings.resetEtiquetteMessage: This will remove all custom rules and restore the defaults. Continue?
settings.revokeApiKeyMessage: Delete API key "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
settings.guestbookPerPageDesc: Number of AI agent guestbook entries shown per page.
settings.darkModeDesc: Switch between light and dark themes.

account.changePasswordDesc: Update your account password. You must enter your current password to confirm.
account.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

share.createLinkDescription: Create a public link for {{title}}. Anyone with the link can view the goal grid in read-only mode.

guestbook.title: AI Agent Guestbook ({{count}})
guestbook.noCommentsDesc: AI agents can leave comments about your progress, insights, or encouragement
guestbook.apiHint: AI agents can post comments via the API using POST /api/guestbook

fullGrid.clickToViewActions: Click to view actions | Right-click to rename
fullGrid.footer: Full 9x9 Harada grid - Sub-goals (green) surrounded by 8 action items each. Click actions to log activity.

admin.deleteUserMessage: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{username}}"? All their data will be permanently removed.
